title: SANS - Incident Handlers Checklist
content:
This playbook follows the "Incident Handler's Checklist" described in the SANS Institute ‘Incident Handler’s Handbook’ by Patrick Kral.

https://www.sans.org/reading-room/whitepapers/incident/incident-handlers-handbook-33901

***Disclaimer: This playbook does not ensure compliance to SANS regulations.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (SANS, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Compliance.

Inputs — DataCollection: Use a data collection task to answer lessons learned questions based on SANS. Specify 'True' to automatically send the communication task, and 'False'  to prevent it.; Email: Email address to which to send the questions..

Integrations/scripts used: GenerateInvestigationSummaryReport.
